name: Magic City Indoor Golf
about: Magic City Indoor Golf is an indoor golf facility offering a combination of advanced technology and professional instruction. The venue features GCHawk launch monitors, GSPro course software, and Swing Catalyst video analysis technology for comprehensive swing and putting analysis. Located in Hoover, Alabama, it provides a dedicated space for golf practice, lessons, and competitive leagues. Memberships, bay rentals, and club fitting services are available, with the option to book sessions online or by phone.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive swing analysis with video and balance plate technology
Access to over 1100 virtual courses with GSPro software
Option for group events and private parties
In-house club fitting services from major manufacturers

food_and_drink.notes: Variety of snacks available, with option to have food delivered
Beer, wine, and sodas available for purchase

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead-mounted launch monitor with ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, and you can also bring your own clubs. Club fitting services from major manufacturers are also offered.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food delivery is permitted, and the venue offers snacks, sodas, beer, and wine for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the virtual course and player pace, but typical sessions range from 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior instruction and camps, making it suitable for children and families.
